M0840_ECR_OTHER (M0840) Other than Above Reasons for Emergent Care Emergent Care Reason: other than above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
M0840_ECR_RESP (M0840) Respiratory Problems Emergent Care Reason: respiratory problems. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
M0840_ECR_UK (M0840) Unknown Emergent Care Reason Emergent Care Reason: reason unknown. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, Space = Unknown. CHAR 1 x x
